content: Click the Save button below to apply.

comment.text: This translation key is used to display a confirmation message when applying Two-Factor Authentication settings. It prompts the user to click the "Save" button to apply the changes.

usage.context:
{t("TwoFactorAuthEnableDescription", {
 productName: t("Common:ProductName"),
 })}
 </Text>
 <Text fontSize="13px" fontWeight="400">
 <Trans t={t} i18nKey="TwoFactorAuthSave" />
 </Text>
 {tfaSettingsUrl ? (
 <Link
 className="link-learn-more"
 dataTestId="tfa_learn_more"

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Czech translation adds 'a přihlaste se' (and log in), which is not present in the English source and changes the meaning of the instruction.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Klikněte na tlačítko Uložit níže pro aplikaci.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Finnish translation 'suorittaaksesi' (to perform/to execute) is grammatically incomplete and doesn't convey the meaning of 'to apply' (changes/settings). It sounds like 'to perform [something]' without an object.

The Japanese translation uses '応募してください' (please apply/submit an application), which is used for job applications or contests. In the context of settings/configuration, '適用してください' (please apply changes) is the correct term.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 下の「保存」ボタンをクリックして適用してください。

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The tag is missing a space before it, which will cause the text to render as 'przyciskZapisz', resulting in 'przyciskZapisz' without a space.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Aby zastosować wprowadzone zmiany, kliknij przycisk Zapisz u dołu sekcji.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Portuguese translation uses 'para se inscrever' (to sign up/subscribe) instead of 'para aplicar' (to apply/apply changes), which changes the meaning of the action.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Clique no botão Salvar abaixo para aplicar.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Portuguese translation uses 'para se inscrever' (to subscribe/sign up) instead of 'para aplicar' (to apply/apply changes), which changes the meaning of the action.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Clique no botão Salvar abaixo para aplicar.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'prijavo' means 'login' or 'registration', whereas the English context 'apply' refers to applying/saving settings. In Slovenian, 'za prijavo' is incorrect in this context.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Klikni gumb Shrani spodaj, da uporabiš spremembe.
